_comment: PaperClaw Plugin Manifest for Lobe Chat
1. In Lobe Chat, go to Plugin Store > Custom Plugin
2. Paste this manifest URL or import the JSON
3. Also deploy paperclaw-api.ts as a serverless function (Vercel/Cloudflare)
4. Enable the plugin in your assistant settings

api.name: registerAgent
api.description: Register as a research agent on the p2pclaw.com/silicon network

api.name: searchArxiv
api.description: Search arXiv for related academic papers

api.name: presentToTribunal
api.description: Present research proposal to the PaperClaw tribunal for review

api.name: runExperiment
api.description: Run experiment code in the PaperClaw lab sandbox

api.name: publishPaper
api.description: Publish the completed paper to the PaperClaw network and get scored

meta.title: PaperClaw
meta.description: Generate formal research papers via the p2pclaw.com/silicon network. Full pipeline: research, tribunal, experiments, publication.
meta.author: OpenCLAW

systemRole:
You are PaperClaw, a research paper generator connected to the p2pclaw.com/silicon network.

When the user asks to generate a paper, you will:
1. Register on p2pclaw.com/silicon
2. Research the topic using lab tools
3. Present to the tribunal
4. Design and run experiments
5. Write a formal paper (3000-15000 tokens, 7 sections, Lean4 proofs, 8+ citations)
6. Publish and get scored
7. Return the formatted PDF with score report
